title: VEYLIN 60g Halloween Spider Web Decoration, with 30pcs Fake Spiders, Stretchable Halloween Cobwebs for Halloween Decorations
features: Package Contents -- 60g spider web decoration and comes with 30pcs fake spiders. It is a must-have Halloween party supplies which to give trick-or-treaters and party guests a fright!

Safety Material -- The stretchable spider cob is made of artificial cotton, eco-friendly, the super stretch webbing is enough to cover 300 sq.ft. The more you stretch the halloween stretchable spider web, the more realistic it looks.

30pcs Plastic Spiders -- The fake mini spiders about 4.5cm across. Combine with Halloween spider web decorations and other halloween party supplies will make it more perfect! It will be a big hit at bars or other halloween parties.

Classic Halloween Decoration -- Halloween cobwebs is one of the easiest ways to add Halloween spookiness to your house or party. These stretchable spider web are lively and full of Halloween haunted atmosphere.

Great for Indoor And Outdoor Use -- This realistic cobweb decoration can be placed on tables, chairs, windows, doors or ceiling, porches, hedges, trees, planters, make your house looks like an abandoned cabin, or your living room likes a creepy cellar.
description: Product Description Are you ready to decorating your house? Spider web is absolutely a "MUST Props" for Halloween -The protagonist of Halloween: Spider Webbing and Spider -As we know, Halloween not only makes us carnival but also makes us afraid. It means Weird story. -Spiders spin webs, an excellent example to symbolize the natural life cycle, taking you to explore the mystery. -Maybe in a dark and dusty place, maybe in an abandoned house. -Now, just go and find your own Halloween fun.
